title: Minimalist Pride GUI - NONBINARY
description: Nonbinary version. A collection of various pride flag themed minimalistic survival inventories.
body:
![A preview of the Nonbinary GUI included, alongside an example of the hotbar and effect backgrounds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e28be3233e55d10b81e7b4eb1944b886fc88bfc_0.webp)

![A pixelated logo reading Minimalist Pride in Minecraft-style type.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33c79e23a1a5b97ea777b14ef62f38f6d989763c.png)

# ENBY VER.

> **Happy Pride everyone! In a time where much of the world is divided, it's important to be proud of yourself and show support to others, even in the little ways. Please remember you're never alone and we're all in this fight together. 🏳️‍🌈🏳️‍🌈**

## **Features:**
- Survival GUI
- Hotbar (Offhand(s) included)
- Crosshair
- Effect Backgrounds (Ambient and Regular)
- Recipe Book Icon ONLY
- *Stackable

## **Current Inventories Include:**
- Rainbow (Pride)
- Transgender
- Bisexual
- Pansexual
- Gay
- Lesbian
- **Nonbinary**
- Asexual
- Aromantic
- AroAce
- Genderqueer
- Agender
- Genderfluid
- Intersex
  
![A colorful preview of some of the inventories included. In order: rainbow, transgender, nonbinary, genderqueer, agender, genderfluid, and intersex.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8322c85a126709b17c276b5a97ddc750649367c1_0.webp)
![A colorful preview of some of the inventories included. In order: bisexual, pansexual, lesbian, gay, asexual, aromantic, and acearo.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a89a89d3080bd771560470fb6eedf2589a11919_0.webp)
  
### **FAQ:**

**What does stackable mean?**

↳ This inventory pack does not include anything but the textures listed above, which means any resource pack that _does_ include these things can be layered below this one in your list for customization. For instance, download a separate resource pack that changes the hearts, exp bar, food, etc.

I recommend Vanilla Tweaks' pride hearts! [You can find the link here :)](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) 
(Disclaimer: I have no affiliation with Vanilla Tweaks.)

**How do I use this resource pack?**

↳ Place this resource pack **above** all other packs that include GUI changes. If you're unsure which packs include GUI, I'd suggest just placing it at the top of your list.
